finding: The deployment evidence chain was already guarded, but the external-configuration blocker lacked a deterministic, privacy-safe operator handoff that names only permitted secret identifiers and separates configuration readiness from deployment proof.

verification.route: isolated Node 24-compatible test execution using byte-identical committed source and test content

falsification_route: Run the committed test in a fresh checkout, feed a blocker packet with unsafe privacy metadata or an unrecognized blocker, and confirm fail-closed behavior and zero secret-value emission.
